metadata.what_it_measures: ISM Manufacturing New Orders subindex. Most forward-looking PMI component.
metadata.why_it_matters: Baumohl Tier 2 (#13). Leads ISM headline by 3 months, leads earnings by ~6 months. New Orders > 52 with inventory < 48 = strongest buy signal.
metadata.scoring_rule: Same bands as ISM headline. Phase 3.
